sentences_input.text: [PAUSES FOR 3 SECONDS] This is one new methodology that I introduce, which enabled me to very quickly to not only build an orchestra like that but make capable this orchestra to perform.

[PAUSES FOR 3 SECONDS] This was basically the couple of leading world methodologies of approaching the musical education of little children, the first one of which is Orff, the percussion symposium, xylophone and glockenspiels, which enable the children to learn how to read and order theoretical parts of the music.
And the other was the philosophies and the methodologies of Suzuki for the, all the little violins, violas, and cellos, the string symposium, which already enabled them to perform.

And with these two major components, also adding electronic music, which I compose, which also adding children's stories sometime, from famous stories like stories of by Maurice Sendak that I wrote the musical score of that.
And I orchestrated for this show, the orchestra.

And we performed with 500 children in the opening concerts in Caracas of the very famous center there, Maria Teresa Carreno-- this is something get to be like Lincoln Center here, perhaps three times bigger-- in front of 15,000 people, [INAUDIBLE] the president of the country.
[PAUSES FOR 5 SECONDS] by Maurice Sendak, using also his marvelous paintings as a form of moving the top of the orchestra with narration speaker.
We hear that one of the top television stars from the local television, national television, something like Bill Cosby here, because the level was very high level of preparing the concert.

And 500 children performing, half of them the glockenspiels, xylophones, that are actually after the introduction of piano and other parts, the violins, violas, and cellos, the strings and electronic music in the back.
